message:
fix(command): classify Move, Georadius, Georadiusbymember, Swapdb, Migrate as write commands

These five commands were missing from the is_write_command match arm,
which meant they could be incorrectly routed as read-only operations.

- MOVE: moves a key between databases (mutates both source and dest)
- GEORADIUS / GEORADIUSBYMEMBER: legacy geo commands with STORE/STOREDIST
  options that can write results to a destination key
- SWAPDB: atomically swaps two databases
- MIGRATE: transfers a key to a remote instance, optionally deleting
  the local copy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -841,6 +841,11 @@ pub fn is_write_command(cmd: &[u8]) -> bool {
             | CommandId::Zmpop
             | CommandId::Xreadgroup
             | CommandId::Geosearchstore
+            | CommandId::Move
+            | CommandId::Georadius
+            | CommandId::Georadiusbymember
+            | CommandId::Swapdb
+            | CommandId::Migrate
     )
 }
